what_it_does: A self-contained design-system preview card rendering the brand's signature grouped-settings container: a soft-gold-tinted panel (no border/shadow) holding two columns of titled checkbox groups (Menu Options, Navigation Options).
observations: Carries the @dsCard metadata comment (group Brand, name 'Soft-gold section panel', viewport 700x320).
.panel uses --accent-gold-50 background, --r-lg radius, no border or shadow — a colour-wash grouping.
Group titles carry a small circular 'i' info badge (--accent-gold fill, white glyph).
Reuses the same CSS-only gold checkbox pattern (.box + ::after checkmark; .off variant) seen in the inputs card.
Lead text explicitly contrasts this flat product-chrome pattern with the deck/generative surfaces' 'depth-keyed zone wash' (--zone-* near-white ladder), referencing a separate grouping mechanism.
Checkbox content mirrors real product settings (Information Panel, Floorplan, Renders & Videos, turning arrows, Apply to all Hubs).
standouts: Lead text documents a two-system grouping distinction: flat colour-wash for product chrome vs depth-keyed zone wash for generative surfaces.
Named as 'the brand's signature grouped-settings container'.
conventions: Follows token references for colours, radii.
Reuses the shared gold-checkbox pattern (consistent with the inputs card's approach).
Real product setting labels keep the preview grounded rather than lorem.
notes: The signature soft-gold settings panel — a borderless colour-wash grouping container with two checkbox columns; lead text distinguishes it from the zone-wash depth grouping.
questions: Where is the contrasting 'depth-keyed zone wash' (--zone-*) pattern actually defined, since this file only references it?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches — declares the soft-gold section panel preview and renders it, with prose situating it among grouping patterns.
apparent_themes: two-mode grouping doctrine (flat chrome vs depth zone)
intention_signals: To establish the borderless tinted-panel as the canonical product-chrome grouping device and explicitly distinguish it from the generative-surface depth grouping.
novelty: The articulated distinction between flat colour-wash grouping and depth-keyed --zone-* containment grouping.
contribution: Contributes the soft-gold grouped-settings panel pattern plus the documented doctrine separating product-chrome grouping from generative-surface zone-wash grouping.
summary_for_embedding: A token-driven HTML preview card rendering the brand's soft-gold-tinted, borderless grouped-settings panel with two columns of CSS gold checkboxes and info badges.
intention_for_embedding: To present and document the design system's signature colour-wash grouping container and its place among grouping patterns.
